items.title: China executes man for murdering prominent gaming tycoon
items.summary: The court said the man poisoned the tycoon for sidelining him after he helped secure a deal with Netflix for the 3 Body Problem.

items.title: Američka vojska opet napala Iran. Stigao odgovor
items.summary: VOJSKA Sjedinjenih Država je objavila da je izvela napade na jug Irana, ciljajući lokacije za lansiranje raketa i brodove koji su pokušavali postaviti mine, unatoč primirju između dviju zemalja.

items.title: VIDEO Muslimanski hodočasnici stižu na Arafat, očekuje se više od milijun i pol ljudi
items.summary: VIŠE od milijun i pol hodočasnika moli se na planini Arafat, vrhuncu hadža, suočavajući se s preko 40°C.

items.title: ICE agents use pepper spray on protesters outside detention centre
items.summary: Dozens of ICE agents clashed with protesters using pepper spray to disperse crowds outside a detention centre.

items.title: Philippines ends rescue efforts for 16 missing after building collapse
items.summary: Recovery efforts begin after building collapse in city of Angeles, near Manila, kills at least four people.

items.title: Bodies with names: Inside Gaza’s cemetery of the missing
items.summary: Gaza’s cemetery of unidentified bodies reflects toll of Israel's war as families search for disappeared relatives.

items.title: US strikes Iran again: What we know, and is the ceasefire over?
items.summary: Before the US strikes on targets in southern Iran, Tehran said a deal with Washington was not imminent.

items.title: The Atlantic: Trumpov krajnji cilj u ratu s Iranom je predaja
items.summary: ANALIZA The Atlantica tvrdi da je Trumpov krajnji cilj u iranskom sukobu predaja, jačajući Iran i izolirajući Izrael unatoč zračnim udarima.

items.title: Miami says Messi diagnosed with hamstring fatigue ahead of Argentina camp
items.summary: Messi’s return to physical activity will “depend on his clinical and functional progress”, according to Inter Miami.

items.title: Dan kad je uhićen jedan od najgorih monstruma 20. stoljeća
items.summary: RATKO Mladić rođen je 1943. godine u bosanskom selu Božinovci, oko 70 kilometara južno od Sarajeva, na području koje je tada bilo dio Nezavisne Države Hrvatske.

items.title: Taiwan monitors ‘unprovoked’ Chinese combat patrol near island
items.summary: Taiwan reports second Chinese 'joint combat readiness patrol' in a week, says its forces responded to the situation.

items.title: Knicks reach NBA Finals after defeating Cavaliers in Game 4
items.summary: New York Knicks are heading to the NBA Finals for the first time in 27 years after sweeping Cleveland Cavaliers.

items.title: Visoke temperature u zapadnoj Europi, pali rekordi u Britaniji, Irskoj i Francuskoj
items.summary: REKORDNI svibanjski toplinski val pogodio je zapadnu Europu, donoseći visoke temperature, smrtne slučajeve i zabrinutost zbog klimatskih promjena.

items.title: Rubio says Strait of Hormuz will open ‘one way or the other’
items.summary: Rubio says Strait of Hormuz will open 'one way or the other'

items.title: U napuštenoj zgradi u Salzburgu pronađena dva mumificirana tijela
items.summary: U NAPUŠTENOJ zgradi u Salzburgu pronađena su dva mumificirana tijela. Pretpostavlja se da su ondje ležala mjesecima. Policija sumnja na nesretan slučaj, a naložena je obdukcija radi identifikacije.

items.title: As Trump woos China, the Quad grouping drifts towards irrelevance
items.summary: As Washington shifts military focus away from Asia, analysts say the Quad is struggling to define its purpose.

items.title: ‘Come back, my son’: Indian exam leak leaves trail of death, despair, anger
items.summary: More than 2 million aspiring doctors took India’s NEET examination. But the test was compromised and cancelled.

items.title: Vlak usmrtio 89 ovaca u Portugalu, država traži pastire da plate odštetu
items.summary: PORTUGALSKA državna agencija za željeznice i ceste zatražila je od dvojice pastira da isplate gotovo 25.000 eura odštete nakon što je regionalni vlak prošle godine pregazio 89 njihovih ovaca.

items.title: Australia confirms first diphtheria death amid worst outbreak in decades
items.summary: Most cases are in the Northern Territory with some also in Western Australia, South Australia and Queensland.

items.title: Rubio says Iran deal could take days after US forces launch new attacks
items.summary: US forces say they hit Iranian missile sites and boats as Iranian delegation in Qatar for talks on extending ceasefire.
